title: HP IQ signals a shift: Former Humane AI Pin founder Imran Chaudhri on where AI is headed next
description: HP is bringing artificial intelligence closer to users. Instead of relying solely on expensive cloud data centers, HP is focusing on running AI directly on devices. This move aims to reduce costs for businesses and improve efficiency. HP IQ is HP's new experience layer designed to unify devices and enable AI to work across them.
